BMI Calculator

Calculate your Body Mass Index (BMI) to check if your weight is healthy for your height.

FAQ

What is BMI?

BMI (Body Mass Index) is a measure of body fat based on height and weight. It applies to adult men and women.

What is a healthy BMI range?

A BMI between 18.5 and 24.9 is considered healthy. Below 18.5 is underweight, 25-29.9 is overweight, and 30+ is obese.

Is BMI accurate?

BMI is a useful screening tool but doesn't directly measure body fat. Athletes may have high BMI due to muscle mass.
